# Useless Knowledge Encyclopedia

> An encyclopedia-style blog covering science, mathematics, AI, humanities, psychology, art, and philosophy.
> Author: Ignacio Pastor Sanchez
> Mission: "pugnatio contra putredinem cerebri" - Fighting against brainrot through active learning.

## Content Structure

- /blog - All articles listing with search and category filtering
- /blog/[slug] - Individual articles (essays)
- /graph - Interactive knowledge graph showing article relationships
- /about - About the project and author
- /feed.xml - RSS feed
- /sitemap.xml - Sitemap

## Topics Covered

- Science & Physics (quantum mechanics, thermodynamics, experiments)
- Mathematics (pure math, applied math, proofs)
- Artificial Intelligence (neural networks, machine learning, NLP)
- Humanities & Philosophy (ethics, epistemology, history of ideas)
- Psychology (cognitive science, behavioral psychology)
- Art (art history, creative process, aesthetics)

## Content Format

Articles are long-form essays written in an accessible, slightly humorous tone. Each essay explores a topic in depth, aiming for both rigor and readability. Articles are interconnected via a knowledge graph that visualizes relationships between ideas.
